categories.name: JPY Stablecoin
categories.content: A JPY stablecoin is a type of cryptocurrency that is designed to maintain a stable value by being pegged to the Japanese yen.

categories.name: BagsApp Ecosystem
categories.content: BagsApp Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via bags.fm.

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Stocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized securities and RWAs natively issued or managed within the Robinhood Chain infrastructure. Operating as a compliant, financial-grade scaling network under MiFID II guidelines, this ecosystem merges conventional stock portfolios with on-chain liquidity rails. The underlying architecture connects public equities, exchange-traded products, and private venture allocations directly to decentralized wallets while streaming economic benefits like dividend equivalents to verified asset holders.

categories.name: Tokenized Stock
categories.content: Tokenized stock refers to digital representation of stock on a blockchain platform.

categories.name: bStocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized representations of U.S.-listed stocks and ETFs issued by BTech Holdings Limited, a Binance Group affiliate structured as a Special Purpose Vehicle in the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

categories.name: Ether.fi Ecosystem
categories.content: Interconnected platforms and services built around Ether.fi.

categories.name: Sticker-Themed Coins
categories.content: Meme coins inspired by Telegram Sticker Packs

categories.name: Venice Ecosystem
categories.content: Venice is a decentralized, privacy-first AI network that provides permissionless and uncensored access to Large Language Models (LLMs) through a distributed compute architecture.

categories.name: Backpack Securities Ecosystem
categories.content: Backpack Securities is a platform by Backpack that allows users to trade real U.S. stocks through traditional brokerage infrastructure and convert them into tokenized securities on Solana for 24/7 DeFi-compatible trading.

categories.name: Mobile Mining
categories.content: Mobile mining allows users to use a smartphone or mobile device to mine cryptocurrencies.

categories.name: PolitiFi
categories.content:
Political Finance (PolitiFi) are meme coins inspired by political figures.

Note: Most of these tokens have no official affiliation to any political figures.

categories.name: PAAL AI Launchpad
categories.content: Projects incubated by PAAL AI, an AI-centric ecosystem built using Custom Data Feed and LLMs.

categories.name: Recruitment
categories.content: Recruitment solutions designed to streamline and optimize the process of sourcing, screening, and hiring candidates for businesses.

categories.name: Market-Making Solution
categories.content: A Market-Making Solution refers to a service that enhances liquidity in markets by consistently offering buy and sell orders.

categories.name: Liquid Restaking Governance Tokens
categories.content: Liquid Restaking Governance Tokens facilitate decision-making and policy formation in Liquid Restaking Token Protocols, allowing holders to influence asset allocation and platform strategy.

categories.name: Virtual Reality
categories.content: Virtual reality (VR) uses computer-generated environments to create a simulated experience for users.

categories.name: Prediction Market Tools
categories.content: Cryptocurrencies representing projects that function as an application or tooling layer on top of decentralized prediction markets (like Polymarket, Kalshi etc.) to offer enhanced utilities. These platforms do not offer their own prediction bets and markets and instead leverages the liquidity, data, and settlement mechanisms of underlying prediction markets to provide enhanced user experiences, such as trading terminals, copy-trading bots, parlay engines, or social betting interfaces.

categories.name: Algorithmic Stablecoin
categories.content: An algorithmic stablecoin is a type of stablecoin that maintains its peg to a specific value, such as a fiat currency or other assets through algorithmic mechanisms. These mechanisms adjust the supply of the stablecoin based on market demand often by issuing more coins when the price is above the peg and buying back or burning coins when the price is below the peg.
